suggested_titles: Part 1: Two Goals
Part 2: SMART (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound) Goals
Specific: Read chapter books Measurable: Read 4 chapter books
Achievable: I usually read 2 or 3 books per month. Increasing this to 4 books is realistic for me.
Relevant: I like reading chapter books so this is relevant to me.
Time-based: Read 4 chapter books per month for 6 months.
